untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of policy intervention announcements and assessment of intervention effectiveness—external event triggers and fundamental analysis that cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. The core concept of 'intervention assessed as insufficient to reverse structural trend' requires real-time news/event data and qualitative judgment not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the trend-following core logic: entry requires price above/below 100-MA with trend confirmation via ADX > 25 (strong trend). Exit triggers on MA crossover or >2% adverse move (policy effectiveness test). The 40-bar trend confirmation and policy intervention detection are untranslatable. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long and short trends. Hold duration set to 150 bars per parameters.
